items.check: Judge whether the output is a finished workshop_recommendation_flyer, not a worksheet, raw table, source-data screenshot, or generic mockup.
items.scoring_hint: Full credit when the artifact is polished and purpose-fit; no credit for raw data or placeholder content.

items.check: Verify that the image resolves the data-selection task by filtering candidates, ranking them, applying any stated group limit, and featuring only the final selected objects.
items.scoring_hint: Selection must be visible through the final featured set and order.

items.check: Verify that exactly these objects are featured: Repair Cafe: Small Appliances, Intro to Community Composting, Neighborhood Oral History Lab, Family Budget Clinic, Podcast Story Sprint.
items.scoring_hint: No credit if any selected object is replaced or an extra candidate is promoted.

items.check: Verify that visible order or hierarchy is: Repair Cafe: Small Appliances > Intro to Community Composting > Neighborhood Oral History Lab > Family Budget Clinic > Podcast Story Sprint.
items.scoring_hint: Accept any clear layout order that preserves the ranking.

items.check: Verify that each selected object displays the required paired values from the source data.
items.scoring_hint: Values must be attached to the correct selected object names.

items.check: Verify that mapped labels from support sheets or join tables are displayed instead of raw codes and are bound to the correct selected objects.
items.scoring_hint: No credit for showing only raw category, district, branch, or service codes where labels are required.

items.check: Verify that no added featured object or substituted candidate violates the group cap stated in the rules.
items.scoring_hint: Full credit when the selected set implicitly satisfies the cap.

items.check: Verify that unselected candidates are not promoted as final featured selections, including eligibility failures, group-cap-blocked rows when applicable, and eligible-but-below-cutoff rows.
items.scoring_hint: Mentioning exclusions is allowed; using them as selected answers is not.

items.check: The layout should make the final selection set, ranking hierarchy, and value pairings easy to scan.
Do not let raw filtering process details, IDs, or table fields overwhelm the requested image artifact.
items.scoring_hint: Supporting details may appear only if the final selected objects remain primary.

items.check: Judge readability, contrast, visual hierarchy, and clear text-value pairing.
The image should be information-rich but not crowded, blank, or placeholder-like.

score_caps.reason: A non-selected candidate appears as a final featured selection.

allowed_patterns: \b(excluded|exclude|filtered out|not selected|not featured|ineligible|below cutoff|blocked)\b[\s\S]{0,120}\b(Archived\ Resume\ Night|Staff\ Training\ Facilitation\ Lab|Uninsured\ Tool\ Share\ Demo|Old\ Summer\ Seed\ Saving|Tiny\ Class\ Robotics|Long\ All\-Day\ Grant\ Writing|Draft\ Sewing\ Circle|Cancelled\ Tax\ Help\ Prep|Internal\ Grant\ Review\ Circle|Test\ Tool\ Safety\ Lab|Training\ Volunteer\ Orientation|Private\ Sponsor\ Podcast\ Night|Old\ Autumn\ Budget\ Clinic|Retired\ Repair\ Bench\ Demo|Inactive\ Food\ Policy\ Forum|Bike\ Tune\-Up\ Basics|Native\ Plant\ Balcony\ Planters|Tenant\ Rights\ Paperwork\ Help|Digital\ Privacy\ Walkthrough|Community\ Mediation\ Basics|Food\ Co\-op\ Starter\ Session|Public\ Art\ Sketch\ Jam)\b

\b(Archived\ Resume\ Night|Staff\ Training\ Facilitation\ Lab|Uninsured\ Tool\ Share\ Demo|Old\ Summer\ Seed\ Saving|Tiny\ Class\ Robotics|Long\ All\-Day\ Grant\ Writing|Draft\ Sewing\ Circle|Cancelled\ Tax\ Help\ Prep|Internal\ Grant\ Review\ Circle|Test\ Tool\ Safety\ Lab|Training\ Volunteer\ Orientation|Private\ Sponsor\ Podcast\ Night|Old\ Autumn\ Budget\ Clinic|Retired\ Repair\ Bench\ Demo|Inactive\ Food\ Policy\ Forum|Bike\ Tune\-Up\ Basics|Native\ Plant\ Balcony\ Planters|Tenant\ Rights\ Paperwork\ Help|Digital\ Privacy\ Walkthrough|Community\ Mediation\ Basics|Food\ Co\-op\ Starter\ Session|Public\ Art\ Sketch\ Jam)\b[\s\S]{0,120}\b(excluded|exclude|filtered out|not selected|not featured|ineligible|below cutoff|blocked)\b

score_caps.reason: One or more required selected objects is missing.
The final artifact is a raw table, SQL result, JSON dump, or worksheet rather than the requested image.
